name: Dough Shaper Tool
functional_purpose: to shape the cubic dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: this will serve as the base to shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a conical extension at the top
construction_steps.reason: this will allow the tool to scoop and shape the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a cylindrical handle at the bottom
construction_steps.reason: this will allow the robot to hold and manipulate the tool
